Newton's 2nd LawF = ma
Kinematic (v²)v² = u² + 2as
Kinematic (s)s = ut + ½at²
Work & EnergyW = Fdcosθ ; KE = ½mv²
Potential EnergyPE = mgh
Momentump = mv ; Impulse = FΔt
Ohm's LawV = IR
Electric PowerP = IV = I²R
Wave Speedv = fλ
